body: Pushed the fall lineup - added the Hillsdale Sunday market and dropped the two stalls that ended in August.
Reproduced on a 360px viewport - the drawer overflows. Adding a max-width and overflow-y so it scrolls instead of clipping the photos.
Form should capture event date, headcount, and tourtiere count. Replies can go to yves.quinn@voissync.ai for now until we wire up notifications.
Wired it to Netlify Forms and added a honeypot field for spam. Ready for review in #6.
Hero shots from the Saturday market are about 4MB each. Let's convert to WebP and keep them under 300KB.
Default the dropdown to 6-inch and offer 9-inch and family-size (serves 12). Quantity should cap at 20 per inquiry.
